title: Valuation — 14 Oak Lane SW19
transcript_text:
Agent Sarah Mitchell: Good morning Mrs Hartley, thanks for having me at 14 Oak Lane, Wimbledon, SW19 3PQ today.

Mrs Patricia Hartley: Morning Sarah. We've lived here about twelve years.

Sarah Mitchell: The property is in good overall condition. The roof was replaced two years ago and the double glazing is recent.

Mrs Patricia Hartley: We're relocating to Manchester for work, so we need to sell. Hoping for around £650,000 if the market allows.

Sarah Mitchell: That's helpful. When are you hoping to go to market?

Mrs Patricia Hartley: Ideally before September, once the children's school term is sorted.

Sarah Mitchell: Any works you're planning before sale?

Mrs Patricia Hartley: The ensuite bathroom could do with updating — probably £8,000. Garden decking needs replacing too.

Mrs Patricia Hartley: I'm a bit worried about stamp duty changes affecting buyers.

Sarah Mitchell: I'll send comparable sales for SW19 and follow up on the mortgage options discussion next week.
summary_text: Valuation at 14 Oak Lane SW19. Sellers relocating to Manchester, hoping for ~£650k, want to list before September. Roof and glazing recent; ensuite and garden decking need work. Stamp duty concern noted.
